form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At debut, 4th of 11 at Curragh on March 15 over 1408m, in the wet; 10 len behind Pollenca with 57kg at $12. Second-up 2nd of 13 at Navan on March 30 over 2011m, on rain affected going; 2.75 len behind Sir Benji carrying 58.5kg at $17. Progressive type who is likely to feature.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign tenth of 12 at Dundalk All Weather November 7 over 1408m, 16 len behind Prevalence carrying 58kg at $17. On debut eighth of 16 at Naas September 18 over 1207m, 8 len behind Luna Mia with 58kg at $17. Not keen on what we have seen to date.

form.formComment: Back from a long spell. Only had one start last preparation 7th of 12 at Down Royal on September 29 over 1408m, 8 len behind Stars Will Shine carrying 55kg at $101. First up last campaign ran last of 11 at Curragh on July 20 over 1408m, 16 len behind Sugar Island with 58kg at $34. Others look to have the edge.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At very long odds at debut, 13th of 16 at Curragh on March 15 over 1207m, in the wet; 24 len behind Breaking Dawn carrying 58kg at $67. Last start 11th of 13 at Curragh on March 28 over 1408m, 29 len behind Lewis Carroll carrying 57.5kg at $251. Can't see her breaking through for the maiden win this time.
